title: Harden Dynamic Resource Allocation in Your Cluster — Grant scheduler and allocation-controller permissions
text:
Apply a role that allows binding-related updates:
apiVersion
:
rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
ClusterRole
metadata
:
name
:
dra-binding-updater
rules
:
-
apiGroups
:
[
"resource.k8s.io"
]
resources
:
[
"resourceclaims/status"
]
verbs
:
[
"get"
,
"patch"
,
"update"
]
-
apiGroups
:
[
"resource.k8s.io"
]
resources
:
[
"resourceclaims/binding"
]
verbs
:
[
"patch"
,
"update"
]
